title: NetTerm
summary: SSH / telnet / USB-serial / shell terminal with profiles, VPN, macros and file injection.
description: A pocket terminal for network gear on the M5CardputerZero. Connect over SSH, telnet, USB-serial console (picocom) or a local shell. Connection profiles with OS-managed VPN (WireGuard / OpenVPN / IKEv2 / L2TP / Tailscale), per-profile SSH identity file and color theme. Session logging with in-log search and a size cap; quick-send macros; file injection with charset auto-detect and wait-for-prompt pacing; scrollback with search and line copy/paste; full SGR colour (bg / reverse / underline / bold); F-keys and Meta; and a switchable English / Japanese UI. Serial consoles get format presets (8N1 / 7E1 / 7O1 / 8N2) and Send BREAK for router password recovery.

ja.title: NetTerm
ja.summary: SSH / telnet / USB-シリアル / シェル端末。プロファイル・VPN・マクロ・ファイル流し込み対応。
